case_title: COMPUTING RESOURCES, INC. VS. CAREER PROFESSIONALS, LLC

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF COMPUTING RESOURCES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CAREER PROFESSIONALS, LLC
